title: Section 45
content: Whoever contravenes any 1[rules, regulations, directions or orders] made under this Act, for the contravention of which no penalty has been separately provided, shall be liable to pay a 2[penalty not exceeding one lakh rupees, in addition to compensation to the person affected by such contravention not exceeding-- (a) ten lakh rupees, by an intermediary, company or body corporate; or/be (b) one lakh rupees, by any other person.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by ibid., s. 2 and Schedule, for "rules or regulations" (w.e.f. 30-11-2023). 2. Subs. by ibid., s. 2 and Schedule, for certain words (w.e.f. 30-11-2023).
